title: Moscow State University
text: Home * Organizations * Moscow State University MSU main Building in early autumn [1] Lomonosov Moscow State University , Moscow , Russia , previously known as Lomonosov University or MSU (университет Ломоносова, Universitét Lomonósova; МГУ, MGU), is the oldest and largest university in Russia, founded in 1755, the university was renamed in honor of its founder, Mikhail Lomonosov , in 1940 [2] .
